Update Center

Player news & trends

Player ratings, ranking moves, roster or team changes, and returns or injuries — verified at the source.

All updatesNewsRules & paddle legalityPlayer news & trends
Player news & trendsJun 18, 2026

DUPR rankings source

DUPR rankings and ratings can change as results are added. Use the official DUPR ranking page for live numbers and treat player cards on Picklary as learning-oriented summaries.

DUPRrankingsratings

Check before acting: Check the official DUPR page for current player ratings.

Verify at source: DUPR rankings
Player news & trendsJun 18, 2026

Pro player news & roster source

For player movement, team rosters, returns, and injury news, use the official PPA and MLP player and team pages. Picklary summarizes only short, source-linked notes in its own words.

playersrosternews

Check before acting: Check the official player or team page for confirmed details.

Verify at source: PPA Tour players
